creator: nightmar@acc.am
text:
Because of mistake of packing list symbolic link in /usr/local/bin
 directory is brocken.

Fix: 

diff for  /usr/ports/www/amaya/pkg/PLIST

--cut here--
18c18
< @exec ln -sf %D%F %D/bin/amaya
---
> @exec ln -sf %D/%F %D/bin/amaya
--cut here--
How-To-Repeat:  >pkg_add amaya-1.4a.tgz
